mismatches.code_evidence: The live file is server/server_main.py, and direct invocation is currently blocked because REPO_ROOT_HINT points two directories above the repo root.
mismatches.doc_claim: docs/audit/CAP_NEG1_RETRO_AUDIT.md says `src/server/server_main.py` is the authoritative server CLI surface.
mismatches.recommended_treatment: Refresh the doc path and narrow the claim until direct Python server startup is fixed.

mismatches.code_evidence: The live implementation roots are server/net/loopback_transport.py and client/local_server/local_server_controller.py; many derived docs still retain legacy src/ prefixes.
mismatches.doc_claim: docs/audit/CAP_NEG2_RETRO_AUDIT.md references src/server/net/loopback_transport.py and src/client/local_server/local_server_controller.py as live implementation anchors.
mismatches.recommended_treatment: Refresh derived audit/docs mirrors to current root names without rebinding canonical ownership.

mismatches.code_evidence: launcher/gui/launcher_gui_stub.c and launcher/tui/launcher_tui_stub.c are explicit stubs; setup.exe smoke also self-reported a stub status.
mismatches.doc_claim: docs/audit/UX0_RETRO_AUDIT.md states that existing runtime/bootstrap is already portable across CLI, GUI, and headless entrypoints.
mismatches.recommended_treatment: Restate portability as CLI/headless verified, Python/AppShell TUI usable, native launcher GUI/TUI still partial.

mismatches.code_evidence: The audited local-singleplayer invocation fell through to the AppShell/TUI surface instead of a clear playable session launch.
mismatches.doc_claim: docs/audit/CAP_NEG1_RETRO_AUDIT.md describes tools/mvp/runtime_entry.py as the practical MVP client/server bootstrap surface.
mismatches.recommended_treatment: Either harden runtime_entry into the canonical baseline launcher or downgrade the doc claim and point users at the stronger live shell/controller path.

mismatches.code_evidence: The live repository uses top-level roots such as client/, server/, launcher/, setup/, appshell/, schema/, and specs/reality/ without the old src/ container.
mismatches.doc_claim: Multiple derived docs cite `src/...` file paths and older root layouts as if they were the active live tree.
mismatches.recommended_treatment: Refresh path mirrors in derived docs and reports during the next documentation maintenance pass.

mismatches.code_evidence: tools/xstack/sessionx/runner.py assumes repo_root/saves/<save_id> even when session_create was told to write elsewhere, so the practical boot path is narrower than the docs imply.
mismatches.doc_claim: Session-pipeline doctrine and reports generally frame session boot as an available governed path once a SessionSpec exists.
mismatches.recommended_treatment: Document the current canonical saves-root requirement or fix runner.py to honor the session artifact location contract.
